title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models from Python code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Bun, and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain community integration that wraps Ollama for chains, agents, and RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (now renamed Open WebUI); offers ChatGPT-like interface, RAG, and admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with builder-style API, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async wrappers over Ollama’s REST API.

title: Ollama-GUI
summary: Lightweight Flutter desktop app to chat with any Ollama model; supports Windows, macOS, Linux.

title: ollama-chat-tauri
summary: Tauri-based desktop chat client for Ollama; small binary, native performance, Vue frontend.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a Copilot-like pair programmer inside the editor.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-enhanced CLI with fzf model picker, conversation history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selector, autoscaling, and ingress.

title: ollama-nvidia-docker
summary: Official Nvidia GPU-enabled Docker image for Ollama; includes CUDA drivers and runtime flags.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG starter using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB; ingest PDFs and ask questions.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Discord.py bot that exposes Ollama chat, model switching, and optional admin-only channels.

title: ollama-django
summary: Reusable Django app providing Ollama chat & embed APIs, admin widgets, and ASGI streaming.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Bolt-js Slack bot that streams Ollama answers in threads and supports @ mention triggers.
